tool_args.label: MTA Staten Island Railway
tool_args.raw_text: Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority is a subsidiary of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority. Its popular name is MTA Staten Island Railway (abbreviated as SIR).

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority
tool_args.raw_text: Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority is a subsidiary of the New York City Transit Authority (abbreviated as MaBSTOA).

payload.entity_name: Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Property Acquisition
tool_args.raw_text: In connection with the construction of PSA, a number of real property interest acquisitions will be required for stations (including platforms, stairways, walkways and Americans with Disabilities Act compliance), electrical substations, right-of-way ("ROW") augmentations along Amtrak's Hell Gate Line, and New Rochelle Yard improvements.

payload.description: Acquisition of real property interests in connection with the Penn Station Access Project, for stations, electrical substations, ROW augmentations along Amtrak's Hell Gate Line, and New Rochelle Yard improvements

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: PSA may require eminent domain
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA will endeavor to acquire all property interests for the project through negotiated agreements, but for a project of this magnitude, the MTA may not be able to reach agreements with all property owners and will be compelled to acquire some property interests through eminent domain.

payload.claim_text: The MTA will endeavor to acquire all property interests for the project through negotiated agreements, but for a project of this magnitude, the MTA may not be able to reach agreements with all property owners and will be compelled to acquire some property interests through eminent domain.

tool_args.raw_text: Tenant agreed to receive base rent construction credits, in lieu of no rent, in the amount of $105,000 or $15,000 annually

tool_args.label: Information Items - Permits
tool_args.raw_text: a. Short-term permit between MNR and the Town of Ossining for the use of commuter parking lots at Ossining Station, Ossining, NY b. Entry permit between B&T and Philip Kaplan Glass and Mirror LLC for the use of a sidewalk and one traffic lane on Tunnel Exit Street to support work at 633 Third Avenue, New York, NY c. Permit agreement between NYCT and New York City Department of Parks and Recreation for the construction of accessibility improvements at the Broadway Junction Station in Brooklyn, NY d. Report on agreements entered into directly by the Real Estate Department pursuant to board policy

payload.claim_text: Information items include: (a) Short-term permit between MNR and the Town of Ossining for use of commuter parking lots at Ossining Station; (b) Entry permit between B&T and Philip Kaplan Glass and Mirror LLC for use of sidewalk and traffic lane on Tunnel Exit Street; (c) Permit agreement between NYCT and NYC Parks for accessibility improvements at Broadway Junction Station; (d) Report on agreements entered into directly by Real Estate Department pursuant to board policy.

tool_args.label: MTA Real Estate Requests PSA Authorization
tool_args.raw_text: Based on the foregoing, MTA Real Estate requests authorization to proceed with the acquisition, by negotiated agreement or condemnation on the above-described terms and conditions.

payload.claim_text: MTA Real Estate requests authorization to proceed with the acquisition, by negotiated agreement or condemnation on the above-described terms and conditions.
